feat.name: Germination of Resolve
feat.text: Vitality floods your trammeled soul, offering you rejuvenation, if not quite rest. For each effect that causes the enfeebled or fatigued conditions to affect you, attempt a Nature check to counteract that effect. The counteract rank of Germination of Resolve is equal to half your level rounded up.

traits.name: Yaksha
traits.text: Divine spirits who emigrated to Golarion from the first world.
